Label: N/A
Issue: The document does not specify the total number of supported concurrent users.
Suggestion: The system shall handle up to 10,000 concurrent users without performance degradation.

Label: Section 1.2
Issue: The document does not specify the data retention period for the telemetry and IDFS data sets.
Suggestion: Specify the data retention period for telemetry and IDFS data sets, e.g., 'The data shall be retained for a minimum of 10 years.'

Label: APAF-FR-01
Issue: The requirement does not specify the frequency of data acquisition from ESOC.
Suggestion: The APAF system shall acquire telemetry data from ESOC on a daily basis.

Label: APAF-FR-02
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format of the IDFS data sets.
Suggestion: The APAF system shall process all ASPERA-3 science data into IDFS data sets in a format compliant with NASA PDS standards.

Label: APAF-FR-07
Issue: The requirement does not specify the update frequency for the web-based displays.
Suggestion: Web-based displays of the most current ASPERA-3 data shall be updated every 24 hours for public view.

Label: APAF-PR-01
Issue: The requirement does not specify the method of password protection.
Suggestion: The APAF system web server shall use industry-standard encryption and authentication methods for password protection.

Label: APAF-CR-02
Issue: The requirement does not specify the backup frequency for the archival system.
Suggestion: The UNIX-based APAF system production computer shall have an archival system with daily backups.

Label: APAF-DR-01a
Issue: The requirement does not specify the handling of transmission errors.
Suggestion: If transmission errors occur, the ASPERA-3 IDFS data shall be re-transmitted within the next 24 hours.

Label: APAF-DR-02c
Issue: The requirement does not specify the format for the calibrated and validated data.
Suggestion: ASPERA-3 data shall be provided to NASA PDS in a PDS-compliant format no later than 6 months after acquisition.

Label: Section 3.3
Issue: The document does not provide details on internal interface requirements.
Suggestion: The Software Design Documents of each of the seven components shall contain detailed information on the internal interfaces.

Label: Section 3.4
Issue: The document does not provide details on internal data requirements.
Suggestion: The Software Design Documents of each of the seven components shall contain detailed information on the virtual instrument data items.

Label: Section 3.9.4
Issue: The document does not specify any software quality metrics.
Suggestion: Specify software quality metrics such as reliability, maintainability, availability, flexibility, portability, testability, and usability.

Label: Section 3.9.6
Issue: The document does not specify any personnel-related requirements.
Suggestion: Specify personnel-related requirements such as user roles, responsibilities, and required skill levels.

Label: Section 3.9.7
Issue: The document does not specify any training-related requirements.
Suggestion: Specify training-related requirements for users and operators of the APAF data system.
